name: min-script-launcher
description: Native CLI/TUI for finding and running agent-generated scripts

scripts.build: bun --filter @min-script-launcher/core build && bun --filter @min-script-launcher/cli build && bun --filter @min-script-launcher/web build && bun --filter @min-script-launcher/mcp build
scripts.test: bun --filter @min-script-launcher/core test && bun --filter @min-script-launcher/cli test && bun --filter @min-script-launcher/web test && bun --filter @min-script-launcher/mcp test
